name: Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc
description_short: Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc is a credit repair provider based in Tukwila, Washington. Rated 3.0/5 with 34 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc is a credit repair provider serving clients in Tukwila, Washington. Carrying a 3.0/5.0 Google rating from 34 reviews, Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc has an mixed reputation among consumers in the Tukwila area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Tukwila, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Tukwila, Washington area who are considering Expert Collection Agency Seattle | Olympic Collection Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
